incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Let's look at this problem again. Count by 5s from 0 to 15.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. The table shows 15 for Slides. Each symbol stands for 5, so count: 5, 10, 15. That's 3 fives.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 3 symbols in Slides column, one at a time: 5, 10, 15

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Slides has 15. Each symbol is worth 5. I count by 5s: 5, 10, 15. That's 3 symbols. See how that works?
